questions.text: Reservations in APO guarantee an absolute confirmation quantity in S4 for the respective customer location.
options: True
False

questions.text: What does RAR stand for, and what role does it play in reservation calculation?
options: Resa Allocation Report - Determines the final allocation quantities.
Remaining Available Reservation - Shows the total available stock.
Reste A Réserver - Represents the unreserved portion of the confirmed quantity for future periods.
Reservation and Release - Manages the release of stock for sales orders.

questions.text: Which of the following correctly describes the difference between “NEO S&OP Depts.” or KISS+ and “WISE S&OP Depts.” regarding reservations and quotas?
options: NEO and KISS+ S&OP departments use quotas, while WISE departments use reservations.
WISE S&OP dpt. guarantee full requested quantity to their AFM’s, while KISS+ departments may confirm less.
NEO and KISS+ S&OP departments use reservation, while WISE departments’ use quotas.
There is no difference; both department types are treated the same.

questions.text: How does "capping" affect the stock pool?
options: Capped affiliates have priority access to the stock pool.
Capping has no effect on the stock pool.
Capped affiliates are prevented from accessing the stock pool.
Capping increases the size of the stock pool.

questions.text: In which scenario is a manual "rerun" of the reservation process in APO required?
options: When the customer allocation flag changes from X to empty.
When stock is automatically released earlier than planned.
When performing manual arbitration/allocation.
During the nightly batch calculation of reservations.

questions.text: Overprotection in NEO occurs when the total of all reservations is less than the available stock.
options: True
False

questions.text: If there's a shortage in period 1, what change is made in the iDoc sent to S4, and why?
options: The reservation quantity is increased to match the available stock.
The delivery date is pushed to the next period.
Capping flag is set to trigger the creation of a PAL.
The SO is automatically rejected.
